title: Best of Osaka Experience
details: Highlights: Arashiyama Bamboo Grove, Togetsu Bridge, Fushimi Inari Shrine, Nara Deer Park, Todai Temple, Osaka Castle (photo stop), and Rinku Premium Outlet. Enjoy a relaxed Japan journey with guided tours, free time, and outlet shopping.

itinerary.day_details: Departure from Manila via Cebu Pacific 5J-828 (MNL–KIX 01:25PM–06:40PM). Arrival at Kansai International Airport, meet and greet with tour guide. Transfer to Osaka (approx. 1 hr 10 mins). Hotel check-in and dinner.

After breakfast, transfer to Kyoto. Visit Arashiyama Bamboo Grove and Togetsu Bridge, then proceed to Fushimi Inari Shrine. Continue to Nara to visit Nara Deer Park and Todai Temple (photo stop). Return to Osaka for overnight stay.
Breakfast at hotel. Free time for leisure, shopping, or optional activities around Osaka.
Breakfast at hotel. Another free day for shopping, food trips, or self-exploration.

Hotel check-out. Visit Osaka Castle (photo stop). Transfer to Rinku Premium Outlet (approx. 1 hr) for shopping until 4:00PM. Transfer to Kansai Airport (approx. 20 mins). Departure via Cebu Pacific 5J-827 (KIX–MNL 07:55PM–11:35PM). Home sweet home!

inclusions: English-speaking tour guide during tours and transfers
Private coach airport to hotel transfer
extra_details: Payment Terms: Remaining balance payable 45 days before travel period
Child Policy: Child with bed (7 y/o & above) same as adult rate; Child no bed (2–6 y/o): ₱32,888
